data.body:
=== HANDOFF STATE (epic positive-merry-hake) ===
DONE (landed on main + closed + completion-signed): 21dd (F2 store-compat gate, ch703), 36c7 (F5 tombstone registry, ch704), 08a8 (F4 release supply-chain pinning, ch709). Follow-up ch705 closed 21dd+36c7 AC gaps.
6168 (F3 build-once + hatch_build None-commit fix): change 719 MERGED to main (green: LLM-Review+1/Verified+1; a security finding — exec() in hatch_build — was remediated to ast parsing). Completion-verifier close FAILED on 2 AC-literalness gaps (AC3: two named real-build tests in test_attestation_signing.py; AC4: check(f) must include evidence-artifacts). Fix pushed as change 725 (awaiting votes). NEXT: land 725, then 'rebar transition ducal-statuelike-ladybird in_progress closed'.
fd84 (F1 release-source auth + version lockstep): OPEN, NOT started. Description REVISED so its 2 former [operator-attested] ACs are now AUTONOMOUS (agent uses gh workflow run for guard-firing + admin GitHub API for pypi env config; escalate only if a scope is denied). Plan-review attestation is STALE (material changed + main advanced) -> re-review needed before claim. depends_on 6168 (now landed). It edits release.yml on top of 08a8+6168; must RETAIN their job graph. Env has gh as JoeOakhartNava (repo+workflow scopes); pypi env exists but lacks required-reviewers.
WORKTREE: ~/rebar-epic-hake on branch epic/positive-merry-hake, HEAD tracks origin/main. venv at .venv (source it every command; zizmor+actionlint+build installed). Gerrit push: git push gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main; submit via REST POST /a/changes/<n>/submit (pin username RebarBotNava). Held-out oracle scratch + briefs in $CLAUDE_JOB_DIR/tmp.
EPIC closes last, when all 5 children closed.
